stemHtml: A weather radar, set to the 100 NM scale, shows a squall between 40 NM and 50 NM. By changing the scale to 50 NM, the return on the radar screen should..

options.a: increase in area and move to the top of the screen.
options.b: decrease in area but not change in position on the screen.
options.c: increase in area and appear nearer to the bottom of the screen.
options.d: decrease in area and move to the top of the screen.
